hooks.command: STDIN=$(cat); { echo "--- hook fired at $(date) ---"; echo "PATH=$PATH"; echo "jq location: $(command -v jq 2>&1)"; echo "--- stdin received ---"; echo "$STDIN"; echo "--- attempting jq parse ---"; echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>&1; echo "--- end ---"; } >> .claude/reviews/hook-diag.log 2>&1
